problem id: 16122fba
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(3) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  01000001 -> 11100111
  00111110 -> 11101111
  00010010 -> 01001111
  11110011 -> 01011111
  00011100 -> 11011111
  01110100 -> 00011111
  00000000 -> 11111111
  00110001 -> 01100111

query: 01011101
predicted answer: 11000111
